step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the consensus that Nickel-Titanium (NiTi) has the least modulus of elasticity among the given options. One additional point supporting this is that NiTi also offers shape memory effects, which means it can return to its original form after being deformed, adding another layer of precision and adaptability in orthodontic treatment planning. Therefore, my final answer remains: A.
